author: codex-agent

patch.value:
Feature spans runtime detection, fallback behavior, tests, and docs updates for Ollama-backed semantic defaults.

## Detailed implementation plan

1) Runtime semantic-default resolution (`pm-wn3r`)
- Add deterministic auto-default resolution used by search runtime when explicit provider/vector settings are absent.
- Prefer explicit user configuration first; only apply auto defaults when unset to avoid breaking existing setups.
- Resolve an Ollama-backed provider/vector pair suitable for local execution, then keep default search mode behavior aligned (hybrid when semantic capability is present).
- Add safe fallback so default-mode search does not hard-fail for users when auto semantic dependencies are unavailable at runtime.

2) Regression coverage (`pm-9k33`)
- Extend `tests/unit/search-command.spec.ts` to validate mode selection and fallback semantics with and without explicit config.
- Extend provider tests to cover auto-default resolution and precedence rules.
- Run targeted and full sandbox-safe suites to ensure no regressions for current users.

3) Docs and release evidence (`pm-ptu0`)
- Update README + ARCHITECTURE contracts to explain default behavior and precedence/fallback guardrails.
- Add CHANGELOG entry with user impact and compatibility notes.
- Record host-level verification evidence (Ollama available + semantic search execution checks) before close.

4) Verification and closure
- Run `pnpm build`, targeted unit suites, and full `node scripts/run-tests.mjs test`.
- Validate semantic functionality on this Linux host with Ollama installed via reindex/search command checks.
- Record evidence comments and close/release task -> feature -> epic once acceptance criteria are met.

message: Record detailed implementation plan before coding

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Feature delivered via closed child tasks pm-wn3r (runtime), pm-9k33 (tests), and pm-ptu0 (docs). Evidence: linked task test runs passed including full node scripts/run-tests.mjs test (62 files, 648 tests), host sandbox validation confirmed automatic hybrid default and successful semantic reindex/search with local Ollama, and coverage run was executed with only the existing global threshold shortfall.

author: codex-agent

patch.value: runtime defaults tests docs and host validation complete

message: Close: Ollama-backed semantic default feature complete with implementation, docs parity, full regression pass, and host semantic functionality validation
